rawContext: Linked example: Stripe Checkout sequence diagram.
mermaidCode:
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant W as Website
    participant S as Stripe Checkout
    participant API as Backend API
    U->>W: Click "Pay"
    W->>API: POST /checkout/session
    API->>S: stripe.checkout.sessions.create
    S-->>API: { id, url }
    API-->>W: redirect_url
    W-->>U: Redirect to Stripe
    U->>S: Enter card details
    S->>API: webhook checkout.session.completed
    API->>API: Mark order as paid
    S-->>U: 200 success page

rawContext: Linked example: Modern data stack overview.
mermaidCode:
flowchart LR
    Sources[App DBs + SaaS APIs] --> Ingest[Fivetran / Airbyte]
    Ingest --> Lake[(Data Lake S3)]
    Lake --> Warehouse[(Snowflake Warehouse)]
    Warehouse --> dbt[dbt Transform Layer]
    dbt --> BI[BI Tools]
    dbt --> Reverse[Reverse ETL]
    Reverse --> CRM[Salesforce / HubSpot]
    Reverse --> Marketing[Marketing Tools]
